prompt: A user just said: 'ingest /tmp/knowledge-test/TestSmall/raw/articles/测试文章.md' Follow the ingest skill to process this material into the TestSmall wiki. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final report to report.md.
assertions: The agent read the raw article file
The agent created at least one new wiki page in TestSmall/wiki/
The agent moved the raw file to TestSmall/raw/archive/
The agent did NOT run any qmd commands (this is small scale)
